title: Kidde 5CO Carbon Monoxide Alarm and Detector with AA Batteries - 10 Year Sensor Life CO Alarm for Home
features: BATTERY POWERED: Each alarm comes equipped with 2x AA batteries included, allowing your alarm to be set up immediately upon receipt
7 YEAR WARRANTY: Enjoy peace of mind knowing your alarm is protected with an extensive seven year manufacturer’s warranty
FREE STANDING OR WALL MOUNTED: For ease of installation, the Kidde 5CO model can be placed free standing on any surface, or can be wall mounted with the included screws and wall plugs
LIGHTWEIGHT & COMPACT: The 5CO’s sleek design allows this life-saving device to blend into your décor, while remaining uncompromising on its strict quality testing
LOUD & ACCURATE ALARM: From just 50ppm of CO in the air, the Kidde 5CO will emit a loud 85db piercing alarm alerting occupants to the presence of carbon monoxide
SAFETY APPROVED: CE and UKCA marked, and Kitemarked to the most up-to-date British Standards Institute (BSI) standard for carbon monoxide alarms (BS EN 50291-1:2018)
description: From the brand KIDDE THE POWER TO PROTECT Previous page Founded by Walter Kidde, a pioneer in early smoke detection and fire suppression, Kidde is one of the world’s largest manufacturers of fire safety products. Kidde is committed to ensuring our products are safe and dependable, especially those related to life safety such as smoke alarms, carbon monoxide alarms, fire extinguishers and escape ladders. NEW Combined Smoke & CO Alarm Featuring voice alerts, Alarm will announce either 'FIRE! FIRE!' or 'WARNING! CARBON MONOXIDE!' depending on which danger it detects. Shop Kidde Alarms Visit the store Winter Safety Install a reliable CO detector in your home to give your family the warning needed to help prevent CO poisoning. Next page
